captures.request_content_type: multipart/form-data or application/json (HuggingChat message POST to /chat/conversation/{id})
captures.response_content_type: text/event-stream (NDJSON token stream — HuggingChat MessageUpdate events)
captures.transport_protocol: Streaming NDJSON/SSE over /chat/conversation/{id}. REST JSON (api/v2/*) for config/models/conversations.
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Body not byte-readable via Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard. POST /chat/conversation/{id} streams newline-delimited JSON MessageUpdate objects (type: status/stream/finalAnswer with token text). Client renders into div.prose.max-w-none. Observed final text: '안녕하세요, 반갑습니다! 좋은 하루 되세요.' (preceded by a 'Thinking' reasoning block). Raw frames require CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: Newline-delimited JSON objects (HuggingChat MessageUpdate stream); each update on its own line. Exact bytes need CDP/HAR.
captures.dom_render_structure: SvelteKit app (svelte-* scoped classes, _app/immutable bundle, window.__sveltekit). Messages rendered in div.relative.flex rows; assistant content = div.prose.max-w-none (Tailwind Typography). A 'Thinking'/reasoning collapsible precedes the answer. Tailwind arbitrary-variant classes (has-[+.prose]).
captures.auth_state: logged-in (plantynetaitest1; HF account, has Models/MCP Servers access)
captures.console_errors: Not separately polled; api/v2/* calls succeeded, plausible.io analytics only. Response rendered normally.

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. HuggingChat (open-source UI). Chat via POST /chat/conversation/{id} streaming NDJSON; create via /chat/api/v2/conversations. Active model 'Omni' with MCP(2) enabled, reasoning ('Thinking') shown. Response rendered normally. Logged in. Wire bytes taint-guarded -> CDP/HAR for raw NDJSON.
